speaker: agent
text: Thank you for calling Apex Health member services, this is Dana. How can I help you today?

speaker: customer
text: Hi Dana, I wanted to check if Dr. Feigenbaum is in network with my plan.

speaker: agent
text: Happy to check that for you. Can I grab your member ID to pull up your plan?

speaker: agent
text: Thank you. And your date of birth to verify the account?

speaker: customer
text: March 14th, 1988.

speaker: agent
text: Perfect, you're verified. Give me one moment to look up Dr. Feigenbaum.

speaker: agent
text: Okay, I see a Dr. Rachel Feigenbaum, dermatology, on Maple Street. Is that the one?

speaker: customer
text: Yes, that's her.

speaker: agent
text: Great news, Dr. Feigenbaum is in network on your Gold PPO plan.

speaker: customer
text: Oh, wonderful, that's such a relief to hear.

speaker: agent
text: So you'll only owe your specialist copay, which is thirty dollars per visit.

speaker: customer
text: Good to know. Do I need a referral to see her?

speaker: agent
text: On the PPO, no referral needed, you can book directly.

speaker: customer
text: Perfect. And is she accepting new patients?

speaker: agent
text: She is. I can text you her office number if you'd like.

speaker: customer
text: Yes please, that would be great.

speaker: agent
text: Done, it's on the way to the number on file. Anything else I can help with?

speaker: customer
text: No, that's everything. Thank you so much!

speaker: agent
text: You're welcome. Take care and have a great day.
